label: schema • value outside a string enum is rejected and named
notes: Pins the `enum` gate end-to-end through coercion: `purple` is not in {red,green,blue} and has no case-insensitive match, so coercion leaves it untouched and the validator must reject it surfacing `color`. Complements the coercion suite's case-folding cases (which prove a CASE variant is ACCEPTED) by proving a genuine non-member is REJECTED.
